items.reponse: It is placed in targeted spots, out of reach, along the insects' runways. We flag any precautions before we leave.

items.question: When will the kitchen be quiet again?
items.reponse: Activity drops within days: the gel spreads through the colony and reaches even the hidden individuals.

items.question: Do you treat restaurants and shops?
items.reponse: Yes, business premises as well as homes; we gladly schedule outside your opening hours.

meta.title: 50% tax credit on home cleaning in Nîmes

content.titre: Home cleaning at half the cost
content.intro: Your home cleaning at half price: 50% refunded, URSSAF instant advance and CESU accepted — an hour billed €30 ends up costing you €15.

content.argumentaire: Half of your home-cleaning spend is refunded, up to €12,000 of annual expenses per household.
points: 50% refunded on services performed in your home
You only advance your half thanks to the instant advance
Scheme opened through our partnership with the Accès SAP cooperative
content.cardIntro: Try your real hours: the figure updates instantly.
content.note: Amounts shown for illustration; the tax credit applies to services performed at your home, via the Accès SAP cooperative.

items.question: In practice, how do the 50% come back to me?
items.reponse: Cleaning carried out at your home opens a tax credit equal to half the amounts paid, capped at €12,000 of annual expenses per household. An hour billed at €30 therefore costs you €15. This right exists because SANAD CLEAN operates within the Accès SAP cooperative, approved for home-help services.

items.question: The instant advance — what does it change?
items.reponse: Everything, cash-flow wise: instead of waiting for next year's tax return, URSSAF deducts the credit at the moment you pay. You settle only your half, from the very first invoice. Activation goes through Accès SAP.

items.question: Which services stay outside the scheme?
items.reponse: Anything that does not take place in a private home: offices, shops and business premises, plus pest control (bed bugs, cockroaches). For borderline jobs — terraces, clear-outs — eligibility depends on the exact nature of the work: your quote states it in black and white.

items.question: Can I pay with CESU?
items.reponse: Yes, CESU is accepted for home cleaning. Combined with the tax credit, it brings your hour down to a real €15.

content.titre: The 50% applies from the very first invoice
content.sousTitre: The instant advance kicks in from your very first invoice — the steps go through Accès SAP.

items.question: What's the key thing about the 50% tax credit?
items.reponse: In short: half of your home-cleaning spend comes back to you, and the instant advance saves you waiting until next year. Ceiling, conditions and examples are gathered on our tax credit page.

items.question: Are CESU vouchers an accepted means of payment?
items.reponse: Yes, for services carried out at your home. They combine with the 50% tax credit.

items.question: Is my town covered?
items.reponse: The Nîmes Gard is our daily ground: every job takes place within 30 km of Nîmes. The full list of towns is on the service-area page.

items.question: Can I ask for gentle or eco-friendly products?
items.reponse: Of course: just say so at the quote stage. We systematically adapt products around children, pets or fragile surfaces.

items.question: What are your days and hours?
items.reponse: We work 7 days a week, 8am to 7pm; in an emergency a slot can be found outside those hours.

items.question: How long until I get a quote?
items.reponse: Your estimate goes out within 24 hours, and travel is free across Nîmes and 20 km around.
